data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis, minor): Add check_cycle_at_level to the module docstring's Public API section (lines 8-13 of ticket-graph.py) following the existing pattern. Criterion: - [ ] check_cycle_at_level listed in module docstring Public API section. Verify: grep -q 'check_cycle_at_level' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py | head -15
